languages.text: {n}Однорукий рабочий склоняет голову и шагает вперед.{/n} "Да тут один паренек, солдат из пустотников, которому череп размозжило, недавно вернулся к нам после лечения. Башка перемотана, весь {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}переколотый стимуляторами{/g}, ни жить, ни работать не может, только бредит и пугает людей. А все потому, что не стали его имплататами лечить! Позвольте нам хоть какие-то железки вставлять, а то ведь мы все рано или поздно в безумцев на этих поганых симуляторах превратимся!"

traits.locale_text: Ну нам очень не понравился тот челик без аугментаций

languages.text: {n}The one-armed worker bows his head and steps forward.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to us after treatment not long ago. His head's all bandaged and he's dosed up to the eyeballs on {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}stimulants{/g}. He can't live, can't work, he just raves and scares honest folk. And all because he wasn't given implants! At least let us put some hardware in, or sooner or later we'll all turn into madmen on these rotten stimulants!"

languages.text: {n}片腕の労働者、頭を下げて前に出る。{/n}「最近、治療を受けて戻ってきた、頭が潰れた空trooperの仲間がいる。頭は包帯で覆われていて、覚醒剤で朦朧としている。生きても働けない、ただ暴れ、労働者を怖がらせるだけだ。それは、彼にインプラントが与えられなかったからだ。少なくとも、インプラントを埋めさせてくれ。そうでなければ、いずれ、このクソ覚醒剤でみんな狂ってしまうだろう！」
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker bows his head and steps forward.{/n} "One of the lads, a void trooper who got his skull crushed, came back to us after treatment not long ago. His head's all bandaged and he's dosed up to the eyeballs on stimulants. He can't live, can't work, he just raves and scares the workers. And all because he wasn't given implants! At least let us put some hardware in, or sooner or later we'll all turn into madmen on these shitty stimulants!"

languages.text: {n}Tek kollu işçi, başını eğip öne çıkıyor.{/n} "Kafatası ezilmiş bir uçsuz eri, kısa bir süre önce tedaviden sonra yanımıza döndü. Kafası tamamen sarılı, göz bebeklerine kadar {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}uyarıcı{/g} verilmiş. Yaşayamıyor, çalışamıyor, sadece sayıklayıp dürüst insanları korkutuyor. Hepsi de implanttan mahrum bırakıldığı için! En azından biraz donanım takmamıza izin verin... Yoksa er ya da geç hepimiz bu çürümüş uyarıcılar yüzünden delilere döneceğiz!"
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker bows his head and steps forward.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to us after treatment not long ago. His head's all bandaged and he's dosed up to the eyeballs on {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}stimulants{/g}. He can't live, can't work, he just raves and scares honest folk. And all because he wasn't given implants! At least let us put some hardware in, or sooner or later we'll all turn into madmen on these rotten stimulants!"

Hepsi de implanttan mahrum bırakıldığı için! En azından biraz donanım takmamıza izin verin... Yoksa er ya da geç hepimiz bu çürümüş uyarıcılar yüzünden delilere döneceğiz!"

languages.text: {n}El trabajador manco inclina la cabeza y da un paso adelante.{/n} «Uno de los muchachos, un soldado del vacío al que habían destrozado el cráneo, volvió a las cubiertas inferiores no hace mucho. Tiene toda la cabeza vendada y está hasta las trancas de {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}estimulantes{/g}. No puede vivir ni trabajar, solo desvaría y asusta a la gente honrada, ¡y todo por no haberle dado implantes! ¡Permita al menos que tengamos esos aumentos, o tarde o temprano todos acabaremos siendo locos drogados!».
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker bows his head and steps forward.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to us after treatment not long ago. His head's all bandaged and he's dosed up to the eyeballs on {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}stimulants{/g}. He can't live, can't work, he just raves and scares honest folk. And all because he wasn't given implants! At least let us put some hardware in, or sooner or later we'll all turn into madmen on these rotten stimulants!"

Tiene toda la cabeza vendada y está hasta las trancas de {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}estimulantes{/g}. No puede vivir ni trabajar, solo desvaría y asusta a la gente honrada, ¡y todo por no haberle dado implantes! ¡Permita al menos que tengamos esos aumentos, o tarde o temprano todos acabaremos siendo locos drogados!».

languages.text: {n}独臂工人低头致意，走上前来。{/n}“我们有个伙计，是个头骨被压碎了的舰船士兵。不久前他治疗完回来，脑袋上缠满了绷带，{g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}兴奋剂{/g}嗑得眼珠子都要爆了。他过不了日子，也没法干活，只会说胡话，把老实人们吓得够呛。这都是因为没给他上植入物！至少让我们装点硬家伙吧，否则就靠着这些堕落的兴奋剂，我们迟早都会变成疯子！
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker bows his head and steps forward.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to us after treatment not long ago. His head's all bandaged and he's dosed up to the eyeballs on {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}stimulants{/g}. He can't live, can't work, he just raves and scares honest folk. And all because he wasn't given implants! At least let us put some hardware in, or sooner or later we'll all turn into madmen on these rotten stimulants!"

languages.text: {n}Le manchot incline la tête et s'avance.{/n} « L'un des gars, un cosmomarin qui s'est fait défoncer le crâne, est revenu parmi nous il y a quelque temps après avoir été soigné. Il a la tête toute bandée et il est bourré de {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}stimulants{/g}. Il ne peut pas vivre normalement, encore moins travailler. Il passe son temps à divaguer, à tel point que les honnêtes gens ont peur de lui. Tout ça parce qu'il n'a pas eu le droit de recevoir des implants ! Accordez-nous au moins quelques augmentations, sinon on finira tous par perdre la tête à cause de ces saletés de stimulants ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker bows his head and steps forward.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to us after treatment not long ago. His head's all bandaged and he's dosed up to the eyeballs on {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}stimulants{/g}. He can't live, can't work, he just raves and scares honest folk. And all because he wasn't given implants! At least let us put some hardware in, or sooner or later we'll all turn into madmen on these rotten stimulants!"

Il a la tête toute bandée et il est bourré de {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}stimulants{/g}. Il ne peut pas vivre normalement, encore moins travailler. Il passe son temps à divaguer, à tel point que les honnêtes gens ont peur de lui. Tout ça parce qu'il n'a pas eu le droit de recevoir des implants ! Accordez-nous au moins quelques augmentations, sinon on finira tous par perdre la tête à cause de ces saletés de stimulants ! »

languages.text: {n}Der einarmige Arbeiter senkt den Kopf und tritt vor.{/n} "Einer der Jungs, ein Raumfahrer mit eingeschlagenem Schädel, kehrte kürzlich nach seiner Behandlung auf die unteren Decks zurück. Sein Kopf ist komplett einbandagiert, und er ist vollgepumpt mit {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}Stimulanzien{/g}. Er kann nicht leben, nicht arbeiten, er schreit nur herum und verängstigt die Arbeiter. Und alles nur, weil er keine Implantate bekommen hat! Gebt uns wenigstens ein bisschen Hardware, sonst drehen wir früher oder später wegen dieser Drecksstimulanzien alle durch!"
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker bows his head and steps forward.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to us after treatment not long ago. Gebt uns wenigstens ein bisschen Hardware, sonst drehen wir früher oder später wegen dieser Drecksstimulanzien alle durch!"
